{{CargoRelic
|name=Hellenic Postcard
|class_id=20109
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=While scouting for info about the Demon God in Hellas, the snail also recorded a lot of local customs, which were brought together in this postcard. You can read it to kill time and post it online to get many likes!
|fame=10
|art=29
|fth=19
|civ=14
|tech=18
|ss1=Hellenic Museum Medal Output +5
|ss2=Hellenic Museum Medal Output +10
|ss3=Hellenic Museum Medal Output +15
|ss4=Hellenic Museum Medal Output +15
|ss7=Hellenic Museum Medal Output +15<br> (Awakened)
}}
